ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Short message summarizing the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "tactic" TEXT /* Tactic associated with the alert (e.g., - for none, specific tactics) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Informational) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the security service (e.g., Windows) */,
  "detection_service" TEXT /* Detection service used (e.g., Microsoft Defender for Windows) */,
  "detection_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation or resource for the alert */,
  "connector_id" TEXT /* ID of the connector used to generate the alert */,
  "data_types" TEXT /* Data types related to the alert (e.g., SecurityAlert (ASC)) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "affected_asset" TEXT /* The specific asset affected by the alert */,
  "affected_asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the affected asset */,
  "affected_asset_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the affected asset */,
  "affected_asset_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the affected asset */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert */,
  "alert_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the alert source */,
  "alert_source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source generating the alert */,
  "alert_source_hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the source generating the alert */,
  "alert_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata related to the alert */,
  "alert_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the alert (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "alert_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the threat */,
  "alert_custom_fields" TEXT /* Custom fields for additional information */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken to resolve the alert (e.g., None, Investigated, Mitigated) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the resolution */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry */,
  "log_source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the log source */,
  "log_source_hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the log source */,
  "log_custom_fields" TEXT /* Custom fields for additional information */,
  "alert_severity_change" TEXT /* If the severity level was changed, this field captures the new severity */,
  "alert_status_change" TEXT /* If the status of the alert was changed, this field captures the new status */,
  "alert_tactic_change" TEXT /* If the tactic associated with the alert was changed, this field captures the new tactic */,
  "alert_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the alert (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
